'''ST-4402''' was the designation<ref name="JKTCG" /> of a [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="CSWE" /> who served as an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Desert stormtrooper/Legends|sandtrooper]] [[Squad/Legends|squad]] leader<ref name="Pauldron">{{DB|organization|sandtroopers|sandtroopers}} confirms [[Color/Legends|orange]] [[Limb/Legends|shoulder]] [[Pauldron/Legends|pauldrons]] are indicative of sandtrooper squad leaders. Based on the visual evidence, this article treats ST-4402 as a squad leader.</ref> assigned to a [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Like other [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] assigned to a garrison on Tatooine, ST-4402 possessed the firepower to deal with any local trouble that could arise. The [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] wore the standard suit of [[Stormtrooper armor/Legends|stormtrooper armor]], and wielded a [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]].<ref name="JKTCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
The first and only source to mention ST-4402 is a card in [[Decipher]]'s [[2001]] ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]''.<ref name="JKTCG" />
